summary: Key data points for MSFT Q2 FY2026 revenue forecast
content:
## Key Data Points
- Analyst consensus (Yahoo Finance, 34 analysts): $80.08B for Q2 FY2026 (Oct-Dec 2025)
- Q1 FY2026 (Jul-Sep 2025): $77.673B (beat $75.4B consensus by 3.0%)
- Q2 FY2025 (Oct-Dec 2024): $69.632B (beat by 1.35%)
- YoY growth accelerating: 12.3% (Q2 FY2025) → 13.2% (Q3) → 18.1% (Q4) → 18.4% (Q1 FY2026)
- Consensus implies 15% YoY and 3.1% sequential growth
- Historical Q1→Q2 sequential growth was 6.1% in FY2025
- If 6.1% sequential: $82.3B
- Microsoft consistently beats revenue estimates by 1-3%
- Key drivers: Azure AI cloud growth (40% in Q1), Office 365, enterprise spending
